title: YVtils MultiMine
description: Timber and VeinMiner in one Plugin
body:
![Plugin Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XpSkXqAa/images/3604739fcb2f386c22064111f7d8606b5ca7ce1d.png)

# MultiMine (VeinMiner & Timber)

`/mm add [block]`
`/mm addMultiple`
`/mm remove [block]`
`/mm removeMultiple`

- MultiMine Blocks
- Add/Remove multiple blocks at once with a contaimer in your hand

![MultiMine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/6c0453c34457536349ea6fff36536d7474f30adc.gif)
![MultiMine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/c9db0e0a279c011e0cd29076194ae20795c014d6.gif)

## Standalone Version of MultiMine Module from the [YVtils-SMP Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/yvtils_smp)
